test_queries.question: How many annual leave days do employees receive each year?
test_queries.reference: Employees receive 20 annual leave days each calendar year.

test_queries.question: How many unused annual leave days can employees carry forward?
test_queries.reference: Employees may carry forward up to 10 unused annual leave days into the next calendar year.

test_queries.question: What is the notice period for resignation?
test_queries.reference: Employees must provide at least 30 days written notice before resignation.

test_queries.question: Are remote work days allowed each week?
test_queries.reference: Eligible employees may work remotely up to 2 days per week with manager approval.

test_queries.question: What is the company's policy on pet elephants?
test_queries.reference: I don't know based on the available documents.
